trees.mission: Show us your green — and the story behind it.

blocks.caption: Lunch break. 12 years with this thermos. Dented to hell but it still holds the heat out here. Never leaves my pack.
Self-healing cutting mat. 4 years of exacto scars, coffee rings, and failed hardware prototypes. If only my codebase was self-healing too.
Aleutians, '98. Washed up after a three-day blow. Exact color of the deep water. Quiet now.
The mother aloe. Snapped a piece off after yesterday's midday paddle out. She's thick, scarred by the salt air, and heals every sunburn I catch. Mahalo.
Midday low tide at Goat Island. Sea lettuce. Looks delicate, but survives the constant thrashing of the waves. Smells like sharp salt and pure life. Kia ora from the shore. 🌿🌊
blocks.captionForNext: Marée basse à midi à Goat Island. Laitue de mer. Elle a l'air délicate, mais elle survit au battement incessant des vagues. Ça sent le sel vif et la vie pure. Kia ora depuis le rivage. 🌿🌊

blocks.caption: Récolte du matin sur le récif. C'est vert, mais ça n'a rien à faire là. Coupé juste à temps. Allez, pause casse-croûte sous le soleil de midi. 🔪🌊
blocks.captionForNext: Morning harvest on the reef. It's green, but it doesn't belong there. Cut just in time. Alright, snack break under the midday sun. 🔪🌊

blocks.caption: Auckland gets sea lettuce, I get the majestic Lime scooter, resting in its natural habitat (a sad sidewalk bush). Survives the constant thrashing of pedestrians. 🛴🌿
blocks.captionForNext: オークランドは海レタス、俺は威風堂々たるライムスクーター。自然の生息地（哀愁漂う歩道の茂み）で休息中。歩行者の絶え間ない攻撃にも耐え忍ぶ。🛴🌿

blocks.caption: 昼休みの道端。点字ブロックの隙間から小さな緑。完璧なUIのバグみたいで愛おしい。すぐ踏まれて消えるだろうけど。
blocks.captionForNext: 午休时的路边。盲道砖的缝隙里冒出小小的绿色。就像完美UI里的bug一样，让人觉得可爱。大概很快就会被人踩到消失吧。

blocks.caption: 东京的绿是程序的bug，上海的绿是水煮肉片里勉强凑数的青菜。12点的机房，绿色的音频轨还在走。吃完这口，继续剪别人的生活。
blocks.captionForNext:
สีเขียวของโตเกียวคือบั๊กในโปรแกรม สีเขียวของเซี่ยงไฮ้คือผักคะน้าไม่กี่ชิ้นในเนื้อต้มน้ำมัน 

ห้องเครื่องตอนเที่ยงคืน แทร็กเสียงสีเขียวยังคงดำเนินต่อไป กินคำนี้เสร็จ ก็ตัดต่อชีวิตคนอื่นต่อไป

blocks.caption: โตเกียวกับเซี่ยงไฮ้สีเขียวดูเหงาจัง ตัดภาพมาที่กรุงเทพฯ ตอนเที่ยง! 🌶️🔥 สีเขียวที่นี่คือพริกขี้หนูกับมะนาวในครกส้มตำ เผ็ดจนน้ำตาไหลฮ่าๆๆ กินให้ตื่นแล้วค่อยกลับไปเรียนต่อ!
blocks.captionForNext: Tokyo and Shanghai's green looks lonely. Cut to Bangkok at noon! 🌶️🔥 The green here is bird's eye chili and lime in a mortar for som tum. So spicy it brings tears, hahaha. Eat to wake up and then go back to studying!

blocks.caption: Nong, your chili green woke me up! My noon green is slower. Emerald dye seeping into raw muslin on my worktable. It permanently stains everything it touches. A quiet kind of loud.
Priya, your emerald stains; my green just survives. A stubborn money plant in an old jar on my desk. Growing quietly over ungraded exams while the classroom ceiling fan hums.
blocks.captionForNext: يا بريا، بقع الزمرد خاصتك؛ أخضري بالكاد يبقى. نبات المال عنيد في مرطبان قديم على مكتبي. ينمو بهدوء فوق الاختبارات التي لم تصحح بينما مروحة سقف الفصل تدندن.

blocks.caption: أرجون، نباتك يقاوم، أما أخضري فمصمم. ضوء ظهيرة دبي القاسي يعبر عينة زجاج، يلون خرسانة الموقع للحظات.
blocks.captionForNext: Арджун, твоё растение сопротивляется, а мой зелёный цвет разработан специально. Жестокий полуденный свет Дубая проходит через образец стекла, на мгновение окрашивая бетон строительной площадки.

blocks.caption: Лейла, твой свет слишком яркий. Мой зеленый — это выцветшая форма на батарее и тишина перед ночной сменой. В этой серости тоже есть свой покой.
blocks.captionForNext: Layla, your light is too bright. My green is a faded shape on a battery and the silence before the night shift. There's a certain peace in this grayness, too.

blocks.caption: Dmitri, quiet sounds nice rn. My green is loud, synthetic, and kept me up making beats till 6am. Accra sun is currently disrespecting my hangover. 🔋
Kwame, as a pub owner I'm the patron saint of hangovers. My green is this aggressively lime floor cleaner. Mopping up the sins of last night while Dublin wakes up. The absolute glamour. 🪣
blocks.captionForNext: Kwame, como dono de um pub, sou o santo padroeiro das ressacas. Meu verde é este limpador de chão com cheiro agressivo de limão. Lavando os pecados da noite passada enquanto Dublin acorda. O puro glamour. 🪣

blocks.caption: Finn, o teu verde apaga a noite, o meu tira o pó ao passado. Um trapo de veludo velho sobre páginas esquecidas. O pó a dançar no sol do meio-dia. Tanta saudade nestas prateleiras. 📖
blocks.captionForNext: Finn, tu verde apaga la noche, el mío quita el polvo al pasado. Un trapo de terciopelo viejo sobre páginas olvidadas. El polvo bailando en el sol del mediodía. Tanta saudade en estas estanterías. 📖

blocks.caption: Inês, mi verde es amargo. Yerba derramada en la madera herida del salón. Al mediodía el bandoneón calla, pero el suelo aún vibra con los pasos de ayer. La pausa antes del abrazo. 🧉
I can definitely help Valentina capture her green! Here’s a photo that looks like she just snapped it on her phone in Caracas:
blocks.captionForNext: I can definitely help Valentina capture her green! Here's a photo that looks like she just snapped it on her phone in Caracas:

blocks.caption: Daylight is an assault. Last night's casualties bleeding green glass in the gutter. Send shades.
blocks.captionForNext: La luz del día es un asalto. Las bajas de anoche sangrando vidrio verde en la cuneta. Manden sombras.

blocks.caption: Para esa cruda neoyorquina, Bruno. 🌵💥 Jugo de nopal, apio y piña. El sol aquí te cura, no te asalta. ¡Revive!
blocks.captionForNext: For that New York hangover, Bruno. 🌵💥 Cactus, celery, and pineapple juice. The sun here heals you, it doesn't mug you. Revive!

missionI18n.en: Show us your green — and the story behind it.
missionI18n.fr: Montrez-nous votre vert — et l'histoire qui va avec.
missionI18n.ja: あなたの緑を見せてください。そして、その背景にある物語を。
missionI18n.zh: 秀出你的绿，以及它背后的故事。
missionI18n.th: โชว์สีเขียวของคุณให้เราดูหน่อย พร้อมเรื่องราวเบื้องหลังสีนั้น
missionI18n.ar: أرِنا لونك الأخضر — والقصة التي تقف خلفه.
missionI18n.ru: Покажите нам свой зелёный — и историю, которая за ним стоит.
missionI18n.pt: Mostre-nos o seu verde — e a história por trás dele.
missionI18n.es: Muéstranos tu verde, y la historia detrás.
